title: Sekond POA-LMP114 / 6103365404 Replacment Lamp with Housing for SANYO PLC-XWU30 / PLV-Z2000 / PLV-Z700 / LP-Z2000 / LP-Z3000 / PLV-1080HD / PLV-Z3000 / PLV-Z4000 / PLV-Z800 Projectors
features: The bulbs are made of the highest quality materials and function exactly the same as your original bulbs. They match perfectly with your projector and are compatible
Superior light output maximizes image quality,uniform light distribution to reduce visual fatigue
Take strict test before delivery.Excellent return service and friendly customer service.Any other problems with the projector lamp,please contact us

All projector bulbs are equipped with enclosures instead of bare bulbs. Our bulbs feature an optimized filament design, which helps prevent the machine from overheating or experiencing abnormal temperatures, thereby protecting the bulbs and the projector
Fit Projector: for SANYO PLC-XWU30 PLV-Z2000 PLV-Z700 LP-Z2000 LP-Z3000 PLV-1080HD PLV-Z3000 PLV-Z4000 PLV-Z800 Projectors
description: Installation: 1.Turn off the projector and unplug the power cord. 2.Let the projector cool for at least an hour. The lamp is extremely hot immediately after use. 3.Loosen the lamp cover screw. Then slide the lamp cover off. 4.Loosen the two screws holding the lamp in place. 5.Hold the lamp as shown and pull it straight out. 6.Gently insert the new lamp. Then tighten its screws. 7.Replace the lamp cover, then tighten its screw. Notes: 1.To avoid burns,allow the projector to cool for at least 60 minutes before replacing the lamp. 2.We provide excellent refund service with no any contidition with 20 hours feedback.If you have any questions,please contact us.We will try our best to sole your problem as soon as possible.

specifications_table.Accepted Voltage Frequency: 100 to 240 Volts and 50 Hertz to 60 Hertz
